rejected_patterns: healthcare and biotechnology names without infrastructure linkage
consumer restaurants, retail, gaming, leisure, and packaged products
generic software or AI application names without compute, power, networking, or hardware exposure
financial platforms, broad funds, and asset managers without operating infrastructure exposure
REITs, shipping, trucking, and logistics names where the context fit was indirect or mostly cyclical
speculative small caps with thin business evidence despite thematic labels
